overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay from Assassin's Creed Odyssey, walking through an ancient Greek temple stronghold. The player emerges from interior spaces onto a terrace with panoramic coastal views, experiences a weather change from overcast to rain, and approaches an NPC guard among classical stone architecture.

panoramic view of blue sea, distant mountains, and ships on the water

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from a dark interior through a columned doorway onto a sunlit temple terrace. Ornate rugs cover the stone floor as the view opens to a coastal landscape with mountains and sea in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open terrace edge with panoramic views of the coastal landscape and distant mountains. A stone brazier with fire and a wooden canopy are visible on the left as the camera pans to take in the scenery.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a decorated stone altar adorned with flower garlands and offerings as rain begins to fall. The weather changes from overcast to light rain, creating a moody atmosphere over the coastal view.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exterior passages and stairs with guard

NPC guard comes into view near the lit braziers

segments.scene_description: Navigating through temple passages and ascending stone stairs in the rain. The camera turns past stone walls and lit braziers, approaching an NPC guard standing on the terrace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim interior onto a sunlit temple terrace that gradually transforms into a moody, rain-swept stronghold. It begins by emerging through a columned doorway onto a stone floor covered in ornate rugs, where the view immediately opens to a panoramic coastal landscape of distant mountains and sea. As the camera pans along the terrace edge past a flaming stone brazier and wooden canopy, the bright light shifts to an overcast gray before light rain begins to fall over a decorated stone altar adorned with flower garlands. The scene then shifts into the temple passages, ascending stone stairs through the rain and passing lit braziers before finally turning toward an NPC guard standing on the terrace.
